projectDescription: A planned Android-focused 3D adaptation of the classic SET pattern-matching card game, built with Unity 2022 LTS, Clean Architecture, reactive R3 UI, and Nakama server-authoritative multiplayer.
keyFeatures: Classic SET gameplay: 81 unique cards, 4 attributes × 3 values, all-same/all-different validation rule
Single Player modes: Practice, Campaign, Daily Challenge, vs AI (4 difficulty tiers: Easy/Medium/Hard/Expert)
Online Multiplayer: Quick Match, Ranked, Private Rooms, Tournaments via Nakama server-authoritative backend
Pass & Play local multiplayer: 2–8 players on a single device, tap-zone and turn-assist modes
3D card presentation with idle animations, haptic feedback, and distinct visual states per card
Accessibility: colorblind mode, shape-assist, adjustable card sizes (S/M/L), screen-reader support
Clean Architecture with strict layer separation: Domain → Application → Infrastructure → Presentation
R3 reactive UI — all game state flows via observables, no polling in Update()
VContainer constructor injection throughout; zero FindObjectOfType or static singletons
Server-authoritative multiplayer: client submits intent only; Nakama validates Sets and broadcasts results
Cosmetic-only monetization: table skins, card backs, symbol packs — no pay-to-win
Deterministic SetValidator shared between client and server for guaranteed logic consistency
AI Scanner with configurable reaction delay and miss rate per difficulty tier
Assembly definitions (asmdefs) enforcing compile-time layer boundaries
Planned features across 13 development phases over ~22–26 weeks
publicApiSurface: IMatchOrchestrator.StartMatch(GameRules rules, Player[] players, Deck initialDeck)
IAIScanner.StartScan(IReadOnlyList<Card> boardCards, AIDifficulty difficulty, Action<Card[]> onSetFound)
GameSession events: SetClaimedEvent, BoardRefilledEvent, BoardExpandedEvent, ScoreChangedEvent, MatchEndedEvent
MatchState enum: BoardIdle, CardSelected1, CardSelected2, Validating, ValidSetAnim, InvalidSetAnim, RefillAnim, ExpandBoardAnim, MatchEnd
CardAttributes enums: Number (One/Two/Three), Shape (Diamond/Squiggle/Oval), Color (Red/Green/Purple), Shading (Solid/Striped/Open)
GameRules: InitialBoardSize, MaxBoardSize (21), PenaltyMode (None/Time/Point), IsTimed, TimeLimitSeconds
